summary: First end-to-end smoke test after MVP. Backend: auth, leads CRUD, mock WhatsApp, mock AI call, analytics overview all working. Frontend: login -> dashboard, add lead, leads list/search, lead detail (WA send, AI call, notes), pipeline kanban (7 cols), analytics charts (3), logout — all working. One minor template placeholder formatting bug observed on WhatsApp mock.
passed: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user
POST /api/leads/{id}/calls returns mocked AI transcript+summary, auto-advances stage to 'interested'
Add Lead dialog submits and creates lead
Leads page search filters and shows row
Lead detail loads via Link in row; WA send button works
AI Call start works (toast: 'AI call (english) completed')
Notes tab: add-note creates note and shows in list

failed.issue: Placeholder substitution renders as 'Hello {Test Lead T1}' instead of 'Hello Test Lead T1' (curly braces leak through when body uses {{name}}).
failed.evidence: POST /api/leads/{id}/messages body 'Hello {{name}}' -> response body: 'Hello {Test Lead T1}'

failed.issue: After login, app navigates to '/' rather than '/dashboard'. Dashboard does render at '/', so functionally OK, but test-spec expected /dashboard.
failed.evidence: Post-login page.url = 'https://.../' and Dashboard component renders.

action_items: Optional: Fix placeholder regex in mock WhatsApp send to fully replace {{name}} (currently leaves outer braces).
Optional: Either redirect to /dashboard after login or update spec — current behaviour shows Dashboard at /, so non-blocking.
